reason: Authoritative lint + test bar — verify dart format / flutter analyze / flutter test pass, that detect_letterbox / stitch_layout-letterbox tests are present and green, and that the subtitle-mode widget test covers all three changes (hide spacing, percent label, trim toggle).
Re-check widget structure (const, prop ordering, MD3 surfaces, no unnecessary Container) on every touched widget — StitchControlsPanel, StitchControlsSheet, and the new auto-trim toggle row.

Re-check that the SingleChildScrollView added to StitchControlsSheet does not regress WindowSizeClass dispatch — the expanded/large branch must continue to render the unwrapped StitchControlsPanel inside its own SingleChildScrollView on the right side.

Re-check that the renamed field (subtitleBandHeightPercent) and new field (autoTrimBlackBars) are exposed through the controller (not mutated from widgets directly), and that the percent → px conversion lives in StitchRenderRequest.fromState / controller, not in layout.

Re-check exhaustive call-site updates after the breaking field rename (copyWith / initial / fromState / persistence — none expected in this repo but verify), and that LetterboxInsets is value-equal so identity-based caching works.
